2259510.name: 马良
2259510.description:
Please visit marleen.ai for more information

Marleen is a lookdev software that revolutionizes the way artists create PBR materials. With Marleen, artists can generate ready-to-use PBR materials in no time using natural language and even reference images, and then fine-tune properties like normal, smoothness, metalness, and more to achieve the perfect look.
Thanks to Marleen's advanced AI material generation technology, artists can streamline their workflow and create stunning PBR materials with ease, making it the perfect tool for both beginners and professionals looking to take their creations to the next level.
Marleen's versatile range of material adjustment settings caters to the needs of both novice traditional artists and seasoned professionals alike. It is an ideal tool for those who are new to material creation, as well as for those who want to experiment before embarking on their next project. Marleen will help you elevate your material creation skills to the next level, regardless of your level of experience.
Get ready to unleash your creativity with Marleen, the possibilities are truly endless! With our cutting-edge technology, you can bring your wildest visions to life in no time. Don't wait any longer to experience the future of 3D asset creation - try Marleen today and see for yourself what all the fuss is about!
